reachability_artifacts: go test ./cmd/sworn -run V015Conformance -count=1 builds sworn and drives public CLI and MCP subprocesses through isolated temporary Git repositories, bare remotes, failures, restarts, merges, re-plan, ship, and mark-shipped
release_benefit: The release has one public, restart-spanning proof that Sworn enforces the exact Baton v0.15 lifecycle rather than merely carrying its schemas.

positive_scenarios: A complete real-binary lifecycle reaches shipped with exact pin, evidence, merge, re-plan, and deployment identities.
negative_scenarios: Every tamper, stale identity, repeated failure, invalid rollback, partial restart, or undeployed ship attempt fails closed without unauthorized mutation or redispatch.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: End-to-end public proof catches adapter and recovery gaps that isolated package tests cannot observe.
